problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Acoustic. Acoustic levitation for contactless manipulation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
